meta.defaultTitle: Snake Online — मल्टीप्लेयर सांप बैटल रॉयल
meta.defaultDescription: Snake Online खेलें: अल्टीमेट मल्टीप्लेयर सांप .io गेम। हज़ारों खिलाड़ियों से लड़ें, दुर्लभ स्किन इकट्ठा करें, ग्लोबल लीडरबोर्ड पर चढ़ें। iOS, Android और Web पर मुफ़्त।

home.description: हज़ारों असली खिलाड़ियों को रियल-टाइम में मात दें। 200+ लीजेंडरी स्किन। iOS, Android, Web पर मुफ़्त।

compare.title: Snake Online vs the rest.
compare.subtitle: We rebuilt the .io snake genre from the ground up. Here's what changed.
compare.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information from worms.zone and the Worms Zone mobile app, captured May 2026. Worms Zone is a trademark of its respective owners.

faq.title: Answers to everything.
faq.subtitle: Real questions from real players. If your question isn't here, hit support — we read every message.

whatIsIt.a: Snake Online is a free real-time multiplayer .io snake battle royale. Coil opponents, eat their orbs, climb the global leaderboard. 200+ collectible skins, 180+ country leaderboards, available on iOS, Android, and any modern web browser.

isItFree.a: Yes. Free forever, no signup required for browser play. There are no paywalls and no pay-to-win advantages — skins are purely cosmetic and most can be earned through play.

doINeedToDownload.q: Do I need to download anything?
doINeedToDownload.a: Not for the web — just hit Play and you're in the arena in seconds. For mobile, free native apps are available on the App Store and Google Play with the same cross-progression.

howManySkins.q: How many snake skins are there?
howManySkins.a: Over 200 hand-crafted skins across six rarity tiers: Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary, Mythic, and Exclusive. New seasonal drops every month — including country-flag exclusives for 180+ nations.

isItMultiplayer.q: Is it true real-time multiplayer (not bots)?
isItMultiplayer.a: Yes. Every snake in your arena is a real human player. We run edge servers in 12 global regions for sub-100ms latency, so coils, cuts, and traps feel instant — not laggy.

whichDevices.q: Which devices does it run on?
whichDevices.a: Any modern web browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge), iPhone, iPad, Android phones and tablets. One account syncs across all of them.

howToWin.q: How do I get bigger faster?
howToWin.a: Patience and positioning beat aggression. Hug the perimeter, scavenge orbs from kills, only commit to a coil-trap when the target is straight-line locked. Boost burns mass — use it sparingly, only to close a kill or escape.

vsWormzone.q: How is Snake Online different from Worms Zone?
vsWormzone.a: Worms Zone is mostly single-player against AI bots, English-only, with no public leaderboard or web version. Snake Online is real-time multiplayer against humans, supports 14 languages, has a live global leaderboard, and runs natively in the browser with cross-progression to mobile.

vsSlither.q: How is it different from Slither.io?
vsSlither.a: Snake Online keeps Slither's intuitive controls but adds: 200+ collectible skins (vs Slither's ~50), 180+ country leaderboards, daily tournaments, hourly-updated public rankings, and full cross-platform progression. Skill-only progression — no pay-to-win.

progressSync.q: Does my progress sync across devices?
progressSync.a: Yes. Sign in once and your trophies, skins, friends, and tournament entries follow you between iOS, Android, and web automatically.

wormzone.title: Snake Online vs Worms Zone .io
wormzone.seoTitle: Snake Online vs Worms Zone .io — Which Snake Game Wins in 2026?
wormzone.seoDescription: Full comparison: Snake Online and Worms Zone .io head-to-head. Real-time multiplayer vs bots, 200+ vs 80 skins, 14 languages vs 1, public leaderboard vs none. See why players are switching.
wormzone.lead: Worms Zone .io introduced millions to the snake .io genre — but the experience is mostly single-player against bots, English-only, and the marketing site has zero structured data. Snake Online rebuilt the genre as true real-time multiplayer with global rankings, 14 languages, and a transparent skin economy. Here's the head-to-head, feature by feature.
wormzone.verdict: Verdict: if you want the cartoon casual feel against AI, Worms Zone still works. If you want real opponents, real leaderboards, and a real cross-platform progression, Snake Online is the upgrade.

slither.title: Snake Online vs Slither.io
slither.seoTitle: Snake Online vs Slither.io — Full Feature Comparison
slither.seoDescription: Snake Online vs Slither.io: 200+ collectible skins, hourly leaderboards, daily tournaments, 14 languages, cross-platform sync. Everything Slither players have been waiting for.
slither.lead: Slither.io defined the .io snake genre in 2016 — minimalist, addictive, instant. Snake Online keeps that intuitive feel and stacks on the things Slither never shipped: 200+ collectible skins, a public global leaderboard updated hourly, daily tournaments, native mobile apps with cross-progression, and 14 languages with proper localized SEO.
slither.verdict: Verdict: Slither remains the genre's original. Snake Online is what Slither would be if it had launched in 2026 — same controls, modern depth.

howToPlay.title: How to play Snake Online.
howToPlay.seoTitle: How to Play Snake Online — 5-Minute Beginner Guide
howToPlay.seoDescription: Step-by-step guide to playing Snake Online: controls, eating, boost, coil-traps, and climbing the leaderboard. Free in any modern browser.
howToPlay.lead: Snake Online is built for thirty-second pickup play and hours-deep mastery. The basics fit on one screen — read once, then it's pure muscle memory. Here's everything you need to go from new player to top 10%.
howToPlay.readyBody: No download, no signup. Hit play and you're in the arena in seconds.

enter.title: Hit Play — you're in the arena instantly.
enter.body: Click Play Free Now. No signup, no install. You'll spawn into a live arena with real players within seconds. Pick a snake skin (free starter ones available) and a region — closer regions mean lower latency.

move.title: Steer with your mouse or thumb.
move.body: On desktop, your snake's head follows the cursor. On mobile, drag anywhere on screen to steer. The snake never stops moving — your only job is direction. Try wide, smooth arcs rather than sharp turns: you waste less momentum and can react faster.

eat.title: Eat orbs to grow.
eat.body: Small glowing orbs scatter the map. Run them over to grow longer and score. Bigger orbs (left by dying snakes) give massive growth — but they're bait. Other snakes always rush them. Pick them up only when you have a clear escape.

boost.title: Boost burns mass — use it wisely.
boost.body: Hold left-click (or tap-and-hold on mobile) to boost. You move ~50% faster but lose mass every second. Two real uses: to close a kill (cut in front of a target) and to escape a trap. Never boost just to look fast — it's expensive.

coil.title: Coil-trap to kill.
coil.body: You die if any part of your body touches another snake's head. So you don't outrace opponents — you make them ram you. The classic move: boost ahead of a snake, then curl across their forward path. They either crash or boost-burn out of mass to escape.

survive.title: Survive the perimeter first.
survive.body: The edge of the arena is the safest place to grow — fewer attackers, predictable boundary you can hug. Stay there until you're top 30%. Mid-map is where champions get sniped by a bored Top 10.

climb.title: Climb the global leaderboard.
climb.body: Trophies are awarded for surviving longer, scoring higher, and beating larger snakes. Hourly leaderboards refresh — top 1% gets exclusive skins. Top 3 of any country leaderboard claims the country-flag skin for the next season.

skinTemplates._note: Localized templates used by lib/skins.ts to build per-locale skin descriptions and unlock hints. The skin's fantasy name (Ember, Dusk, etc.) and country name are interpolated; everything else translates per locale.
skinTemplates.descriptionCountry: The {country} country snake skin — fly your flag in the arena. One of 180+ exclusive national skins in Snake Online.

descriptionFantasy.mythic: {name} — a mythic tier fantasy snake skin. Drops only during high-level tournament finals.
descriptionFantasy.legendary: {name} — a legendary tier fantasy snake skin. Forged in the late-game arena. Hard-earned, harder to keep.
descriptionFantasy.epic: {name} — an epic tier fantasy snake skin. Earned through sustained leaderboard climb.
descriptionFantasy.rare: {name} — a rare tier fantasy snake skin. A reliable companion for the climb.
descriptionFantasy.common: {name} — a common tier fantasy snake skin. A reliable companion for the climb.
descriptionFantasy.exclusive: {name} — an exclusive fantasy snake skin. Limited-time event reward.

skinTemplates.obtainHintCountry: Awarded automatically when you connect from {country}, or unlocked permanently by winning any country tournament.

obtainHintFantasy.mythic: Won by placing top-3 in any monthly Mythic Arena tournament.
obtainHintFantasy.legendary: Awarded for reaching Top 1% on the global leaderboard once.
obtainHintFantasy.epic: Unlocked at 50 trophy threshold and above.
